description:
I enjoyed Field Mouse's prasÃ¡tko game (problem 12068) and wanted to create a problem of my own with it.

From Field Mouse's problem:

"The rules of prasÃ¡tko game:

- two players place black and white stones on the board just like in go, but they cannot pass and white has the first move
- when a player places his or her stone on the board and that stone touches some other stone (no matter if friendly or enemy), then that player loses the game
- stones touch like in go when they are connected by the line and they can also touch diagonally"
